75663.subject: Watch back: Maple's Q2 Ecosystem Update
75663.body:
A record H1 and what's coming next.

View in browser (https://d31hK604.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/GG+113/d31hK604/VWDwbt8M4YwYW6bNrTS81-WJwW2XSKgS5RdQKRN65wGV05jMY8W69t95C6lZ3pXW6vVpX44-Mm9rW2tQJz44JwvY1W6xWHLH28PdggW18_qhn6vf2lCW6ZvSvZ4H5rqfV9Pn0d8c9x_WW8DKzRQ8dn_-rW8lcQk849f8bFW84FbpJ5m7mjWN6MZXtJJS9syVZZlmb1YPnmRW4jyZqH3zymXSW6FKy7J89c65JW4ZTSyX78ZNpnW8_KDms1_hqVHV1F_DK1K1wtTW1xyvNH4fgfsNV3kfZH3mNGv9W6yjY1Q2F96T4VLnl056sRM1YW2pRBsQ48hkKXW77sNYx3sksv0Vs30Qj1vHM_3N2v9W41kWQjGW97pCLQ7rYYNwW995hFc2hS2DsW7MwVbq4m_xk6VnKJYG68gcT4N237pL3Q2KCHW30vxFN4kZPrjW4Nvsrq3M7zT2W91D_Tq8WpCh7W2FF5y_3BN0SZW1BcNbB3QF9D1W4vLcW485r_ZkW5tqxBt1Y0DdHf57DM9l04 )

Ecosystem Update Reminder (https://d31hK604.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/GG+113/d31hK604/VWDwbt8M4YwYW6bNrTS81-WJwW2XSKgS5RdQKRN65wGV03lcq-W69sMD-6lZ3l3W6_nKPq8XS2SwN861jmZ8KXQXW62hfjs3nmHmZW9dqLrf2m66vdW3Kq0Lg4Ghb1xVsbG0n328v7WVwK9L96PmqTGVBc9vV7g8lN4W6TV0tb6bNk1RW6yWpCp2QvNp4W1B4mhy7S3Y4MW7jCLVk7PQd5sW2Z7HgZ5nRQ4-W5P1f_y5JLPB-W6XyRCx7VZRF-W8FwhYR5QPHCWW4Rdyx6640_DyVrN7Vg4xpK_BW7zBWs65j0nWBW3-_g2_4q0pzjf2Cfd_P04 )

Hi Oleh,

Thank you to everyone who joined us for the Q2 Maple Ecosystem Update Call. If you couldn't make it live, the full recording is now available to watch back at your own pace.

Watch the replay (https://d31hK604.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/GG+113/d31hK604/VWDwbt8M4YwYW6bNrTS81-WJwW2XSKgS5RdQKRN65wGVj9fSYxW6N2M5R6lZ3kGN5GfxDwJslzJW5CDHDt58R-GdVwWYxV8w_tMJW73CR-s5rL7pcW2-C0c64_qgbVN2PWRC0jH4swW62LnlV2WKqX-VDhZzh7QgxWxW87GhpJ2YZnH_W4m5K1D1Htx5hN52LYwbnxsJtW4Wfxp51xXkX-W8mcxcF4mspjNW7RLwZQ20_ys_W2YQDHd2ndMMNN6J6X7J7j_n-W6MTr3d2-mq-YW7vppw654DVV8W7p9wKR8Tj4wKW7GWMmf5cMb_QVRXdCw2JtH-3N82bJnRvx5Z2W1G_wH45gHNkfW2gSfmy6D48mtW2m9N0c5jC5v0VnVtw61Ys58ZN161QZFwX0qZW23MRxj6_jvV5W1-xlY_5Z5l43W2y-txx3JTnDjW45RSLD8SCgt1Mkv4xp8lvmkW13Pz9X1jg-njW6nHrlB35FgZ6W6mgm5d5ltCcfN19G2j6FfNnPW46W21c25txvvV7_RFB7Vw4ZbW63KjJc1BbXGQW4jw14j2M17N6W6qMg153ZtdB0W5NL4yP26TbVpW6M6ZyL1LRs-lW4P7wGP4bCwxQW5tlwtB4Z2qyPN8pYSyMpKKRvW5nTh5D4h9ZzqW8k2Jrc74NqGwW79-1l48mhfJlVv9tR68g7XDTN7jBqt3l97hZW8wKFHG2vZZC_W3Tc9bD28Y8K8W7x85B_70sF10W3JFDls7QCLkdW8-_k17229YxZW31sqDK3-n5qZW3KnjJH606gQsW6Wm53-8qCCDQW1DXdDW6SB4_8W7S5G9H7ZD66PW1RHd5J6LZnf8W2Kl1c-7jP-6YW3vQVW13Wfn6NW7Qz-zF43dMY-W33s6vJ694NS-W4tpczK57-P5KW1W2ddQ9g7DZSW85lwQn388G-yN1v03mVsnD_5dssHQz04 )

Sidney Powell (CEO) and Joe Flanagan (Chairman) covered a record first half for Maple:

- A record H1 - AUM of $4.6B (+81% YoY), YTD originations of $5.4B, and loans outstanding at an all-time high of $1.9B (+123% YoY)
- Resilient revenue - Q2 revenue of $4.4M (+47% YoY) and ARR of $17.6M, even as the broader DeFi lending market contracted 31%
- Yield leadership - syrupUSD outyielded major peers by 110bps
- Financials and token utility - how the balance sheet and SYRUP Strategic Fund are working for token holders
- What's next - the path to $50M ARR and $10B AUM, and our product roadmap for H2 and beyond

We also introduced a new communications cadence: a quarterly Ecosystem Update

75662.subject: рҹ”· The Daily: BNB Chain chases CEX speed without the custody
75662.body:
Strategy's 3,588 BTC sale puts future bitcoin selling in focus | Paradigm raises $1.2 billion fourth fund, expanding beyond crypto into AI and robotics | Federal judge denies Kalshi's bid to block New York gambling law enforcement | Nigel Farage to quit UK Parliament, seek new mandate amid probes into crypto-linked gifts |

The Daily ( https://www.theblock.co/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Written by James Hunt | Edited by Jason Shubnell

Presented by

BitGo ( https://www.bitgo.com/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Happy Wednesday! *Bitcoin's* worst monthly selloff in years вҖ” falling nearly 19% in June to around $60,000 вҖ” has reignited the bottom debate, with *21Shares* arguing ( https://www.21shares.com/en-uk/insights/bitcoin-had-its-worst-month-in-years-is-it-the-bottom?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) the decline reflected a mechanical unwind rather than a breakdown in the long-term investment case.

In today's newsletter, *BNB Chain* is building a new Layer 1 for agentic trading, *Strategy's* latest *bitcoin* sale puts future selling in focus, *Paradigm* raises $1.2 billion for its fourth fund, and more.

Meanwhile, *Ripple* becomes ( https://www.theblock.co/post/407564/ripple-kansas-jayhawks-sponsor-xrp-patch-on-jerseys?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) a *Kansas Jayhawks* sponsor with an *XRP* patch to appear on jerseys.

*P.S.* Don't forget to check out The Funding , a biweekly rundown of crypto VC trends. It's a great read вҖ” and just like The Daily , it's free to subscribe ( https://www.theblock.co/newsletters?select=The%20Funding&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) !

*THE BIG ONE*

*рҹӨ– BNB Chain builds new Layer 1 for agentic trading, targets 2027 mainnet*

( https://www.theblock.co/post/407406/bnb-chain-builds-new-layer-1-for-agentic-trading-targets-2027-mainnet?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

*BNB Chain* is building a new Layer 1 blockchain designed for agentic trading, targeting sub-50-millisecond transaction preconfirmation, according to its H2 2026 roadmap shared with The Block.

* The chain aims to approach the execution experience of a centralized exchange while preserving self-custody, with CTO *David Z* conceding a CEX still wins for co-located high-frequency trading.
* A feature called *TxStream* removes the public mempool, routing transactions directly to the block leader to cut latency and make front-running attacks like sandwich attacks harder.
* The team said block leaders rotate every 200 milliseconds вҖ” too fast for any validator to exploit the role вҖ” arguing the de

75660.subject: What Claude thinks but never says
75660.body:
The Atlas

РҗРІСӮРҫСҖ: GenAI Works


РҗРІСӮРҫСҖ: GenAI Works

    
    
    РҹСҖРҫСҮРёСӮР°Р№СӮРө СҶСҺ СҒСӮР°СӮСӮСҺ РҪР° LinkedIn, СүРҫРұ РҝСҖРёС”РҙРҪР°СӮРёСҒСҸ РҙРҫ РҫРұРіРҫРІРҫСҖРөРҪРҪСҸ
РҹСҖРҫСҮРёСӮР°СӮРё РҪР° LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/what-claude-thinks-never-says-genai-works-auqzf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3Bo%2BhU4PLbRkaOosHmMDAjiQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=2xARGGnPKaAYk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mrce8adt~3h-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mrce8adt-3h
  
Welcome back! This edition goes inside the models and around them, from a hidden layer of Claude's thinking to the tools and releases moving fast this week.В  In today's Atlas Newsletter: What is Claude thinking but not saying? Anthropic found a hidden layer where Claude holds thoughts it never writes down, and built a lens to read them. OpenAI might ship GPT-5.6 this week: the next model is in preview, and Codex builds hint at how a release would land. Fine-tune agents without fine-tuning: Memento lets AI agents learn from experience without ever touching the model weights. Teach your code: a new Claude Code plugin turns any codebase into an interactive map you can click through. PS: Want to collaborate with the biggest GTM engine and distribution moat for AI companies? You can feature your tool with us and reach millions. What is Claude thinking but not saying? Anthropic researchers have found that Claude carries a hidden layer of thought, a small set of internal patterns that hold concepts the model never writes down.В  They call it the J-space, and it resembles the part of your own mind you can actually notice. Your brain runs most of its work automatically, controlling your breathing and posture without your awareness. A smaller slice you can reach directly, like an image that pops into your head.В  Neuroscientists call that slice consciously accessible and explain it with global workspace theory, where information becomes accessible once it reaches a small shared channel that broadcasts to the rest of the brain. Claude has something similar. Chain of thought is text a model types to itself, while the J-space stays silent inside the model's activations, so Claude can hold a concept in mind without putting it on the page.В  It emerged on its own during training. To read it, the team built the Jacobian lens. Reading buggy code, the J-space holds "ERROR." Reading a prompt injection attack, it holds "injection" and "fake."В  And it does real work. Ask Claude to silently think of a sport and the lens shows "Soccer" before it answers, and swapping that pattern for "Rugby" makes Claude report rugby. Swap "spider" for "ant" in a riddle about web-spinners and the answer flips from 8 to 6. Swap "France" for "China" once and Claude's answers about the capital, language, continent and currency all change together, because each reads from the same shared representation. T

75659.subject: Metaplanet Hits 43K BTC.
75659.body:
----------
_**Your Weekly Deep Dive into The World of Crypto**_

**July 8, 2026 В· ****5 Min Read**

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/dbcc6435-4772-417e-93b3-9047130eec81/image.png?t=1783490549)
Caption: ~**Market Snapshot В· As of July 7, 2026, 8:00 PM ET | BTC Price | YTD Return | Fear & Greed | ETF Flows (Weekly)**~

## рҹ“Ў** THIS WEEK IN CRYPTO**

**GM, Readers!**

A week ago, $58,000 looked like the trapdoor. Then a 57,000+ job miss walked in, and the bears got carried out. $281M in shorts got cremated, ETFs printed their first green day in 10 sessions, and Strategy went from villain to comeback story in a matter of days.

Bitcoin opened the week near $59,523, hit a 21-month low near $58,000 on Wednesday, rebounded around $62,000 on Friday, and climbed above $63,000 by Sunday. Every altcoin manager screamed "rotation." Every macro trader shrugged and said "one print."В 

_**LetвҖҷs get into it...**_


----------View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/6c53930f-b4d7-4e7d-baee-6a88bb56a6da/image.png?t=1781097813)
Caption: 

----------
# рҹҗӢ THE BIG WHALE MOVES

### **1. Metaplanet Just Passed 43,000 BTC**

Tokyo-listed Metaplanet added 2,823 BTC in Q2 for $170.7M, pushing total holdings to 43,000 BTC (worth about $2.7B). That makes it the world's third-largest corporate BTC holder, behind Strategy ([843,775 BTC](https://www.strategy.com/purchases) as of July 6) and Twenty One Capital ([43,514 BTC](https://bitcointreasuries.net/public-companies/twenty-one-capital) as of July 7).

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/8e6ce9d1-99ca-4ae3-b99f-23626ebec3f0/image.png?t=1783490633)
Follow image link: (https://x.com/Metaplanet/status/2072573143445544973)
Caption: **Source:**[ @Metaplanet](https://x.com/Metaplanet/status/2072573143445544973)

The flywheel is what makes it interesting. Metaplanet's "Bitcoin Income Generation" arm, basically covered calls on its BTC stack,[ printed $10.95M](https://news.bitcoin.com/metaplanet-buys-2823-bitcoins-for-225m-as-treasury-reaches-43000-btc-holdings/) in Q2 revenue. The effective cost per coin: $77K, below their $80K average buy.

_**Translation: while Strategy fixes its mNAV with buybacks, Metaplanet monetizes volatility to lower cost basis. Same trade, different math.**_

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/1d58b14b-5ba0-4d11-9c68-26e77cc9d5a1/image.png?t=1783490680)
Caption: _**Metaplanet BTC holdings by quarter end | Source: Metaplanet disclosures, **__**[BitcoinTreasuries.net](https://BitcoinTreasuries.net)**_

**рҹ‘үВ  Source:**[ Metaplanet Total Bitcoin Holdings](https://contents.xj-storage.jp/xcontents/33500/ef8f0fb6/d3f6/44c3/aafb/fbe407834e59/140120260702587030
